data.title: A whale deposited 799,895 OMs to Binance, about $4.33 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale deposited 799,895 OM (about 4.33 million US dollars) into Binance after holding OM for nearly two months. The whale initially withdrew about 4.4 million OM, worth 15.95 million US dollars, and transferred 3.6 million OM to another address 13 hours ago. Currently, the value of these OM is 23.96 million US dollars, which means that its floating profit is 8 million US dollars.

data.title: BNB Surpasses 710 USDT with a 8.85% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Feb 13, 2025, 10:41 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has crossed the 710 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 710.150024 USDT, with a narrowed 8.85% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: SOL whales/institutions have deposited a total of 111,600 SOL to CEX in the past three days
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of Ai Yi, an analyst on the chain, SOL whales/institutions have recharged 111,600 SOLs to exchanges in the past three days, worth 22.01 million US dollars. This fund belongs to 271,331 SOLs withdrawn from various exchanges in May 2024, costing about 182 US dollars; if sold this time, it will make a profit of 1.668 million US dollars.

data.title: Binance to launch Lista BNB staking product
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch the ListaBNB staking product at 10:00 (UTC) on February 13, 2025. Users can participate in the Lista protocol by staking BNB and obtain on-chain rewards. The product offers three term options of 15 days, 30 days and 60 days, with annualized yields of 0.12%, 0.21% and 0.25% respectively. Users can participate through the Binance official website or App, and the minimum staking threshold is 1BNB. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: BitMart will launch MyShell (SHELL)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch MyShell (SHELL) at 22:00 (Eastern Time) on February 13, and the SHELL/USDT trading pair will be launched.
MyShell is an AI consumer layer where everyone can build, share and own AI agents. The team connects AI with blockchain through Agentic Frameworks, open source models and AI creator communities. MyShell also provides users with AI-driven entertainment and practical functions while providing them with shared ownership.

data.title: Lens Chain plans to adopt Aave’s GHO stablecoin as native gas token
data.description:
Both Lens and GHO originate from the developers behind lending protocol Aave, now operating under the Avara umbrella.
source: https://www.theblock.co/post/340565/lens-chain-plans-to-adopt-aaves-gho-stablecoin-as-native-gas-token?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss

data.title: Wyoming Highway Patrol Association considers Bitcoin adoption
data.description:
The association joins the “Get Off Zero” initiative and explores the possibility of integrating Bitcoin into its balance sheet, with support from Senator Lummis.
The post Wyoming Highway Patrol Association considers Bitcoin adoption appeared first on Atlas21.
source: https://atlas21.com/wyoming-highway-patrol-association-considers-bitcoin-adoption/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=wyoming-highway-patrol-association-considers-bitcoin-adoption

data.title: Solana Whale Transfers Significant SOL to Exchange
data.description: According to BlockBeats, a Solana whale has transferred 111,600 SOL, valued at $22.01 million, to a centralized exchange over the past three days. The funds were originally withdrawn from various exchanges in May 2024, totaling 271,331 SOL at an average cost of $182 per SOL. If sold, the whale stands to gain a profit of $1.668 million.

data.title: Ethereum Foundation: 45,000 ETH has been deployed to DeFi protocols, and more will be explored in the future
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The Ethereum Foundation officially stated, "10,000 ETH have been deployed to Spark, 10,000 ETH to Aave Prime, 20,800 ETH to Aave Core, and 4,200 ETH to Compound. More content will be explored in the future, including staking."
